overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, showcasing neon-lit commercial streets, narrow industrial back alleys, and open plazas. The footage features dense urban architecture with digital billboards, utility infrastructure, and a prominent red torii gate, characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide commercial street in a futuristic city at night, surrounded by towering buildings covered in bright digital billboards. The camera walks forward beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge, passing sparse pedestrians while neon lights reflect off the asphalt surface.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to approach a striking neon samurai mural on a building wall, then transitions into a narrower passage with industrial scaffolding and exposed utility pipes. A pedestrian in distinctive clothing passes by as the environment becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with utility infrastructure and green neon accents

lighting shifts to darker green neon tones as camera moves deeper into the covered alley

agents.ego_description: navigates down stairs and through tight industrial alleys with exposed pipes and machinery

segments.scene_description: The segment moves through a claustrophobic industrial back alley with overhead pipes, air conditioning units, and green neon strip lighting. The camera descends stairs past trash piles and vending machines in a dimly lit utility corridor with no other pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with torii gate and shops

events.description: emerges from the narrow alley through a red torii gate into an open commercial plaza
turns right to explore the plaza area with shops and digital signage

agents.ego_description: walks through the red torii gate and explores the open commercial plaza with various storefronts

ornamental tree with red foliage in a planter near the shops
large curved digital screens displaying advertisements on distant buildings
metal railings and barriers along a curved street or walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the confined alley through a striking red neon torii gate into a spacious commercial plaza. The environment opens up to reveal shop fronts, decorative trees, and large digital billboards, transitioning from the industrial backstreets to a more polished commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, neon-lit commercial boulevard into a claustrophobic industrial alley before emerging into a polished urban plaza. It begins by walking forward along a broad street beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge, where towering digital billboards cast vibrant reflections across the asphalt. As the camera turns left toward a neon samurai mural, the open street narrows into a confined passage filled with industrial scaffolding and exposed utility pipes. The scene then shifts deeper into a dimly lit back alley, descending stairs past vending machines and trash piles under the glow of green neon strip lighting. Finally, the camera passes through a striking red neon torii gate, causing the environment to expand abruptly into a spacious commercial plaza featuring decorative trees and bright shop fronts.
